hero_title_accent: SAR and STR Drafting for VASPs
hero_subtitle: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams by structuring provider outputs into case-ready workflows and using AI to assist SAR and STR draft preparation with audit-ready evidence.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: SAR and STR drafting delays compliance
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with manual SAR and STR report preparation that slows review cycles and increases operational workload. Fragmented provider outputs and disconnected case workflows make it difficult to maintain a clear audit trail and consistent regulatory alignment.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects provider alerts, regulatory rules, case evidence and AI-assisted review into one workflow that accelerates SAR and STR report preparation while preserving a clear, audit-ready compliance trail.
workflow_title: From alerts to SAR and STR drafting
workflow_description: SFTY channels alerts through AI-assisted triage, structured reviews, case evidence collection and report preparation for accurate SAR and STR drafting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented provider outputs into structured cases, decisions and audit evidence, empowering compliance teams to prepare AI-assisted SAR and STR reports with operational clarity.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured provider orchestration, evidence preservation and governance necessary for defensible SAR and STR drafting workflows in regulated environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how AI supports workflow for SAR and STR drafting

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected workflow layer to structure provider outputs into cases, decisions, rules updates and reports across KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support SAR and STR drafting?
faq_2_answer: SFTY uses AI-assisted review to help prepare SAR and STR drafts by summarizing case details, triaging alerts and generating narrative recommendations for compliance teams to review.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages in an audit-ready format to support review readiness and defensible compliance records.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into a structured compliance workflow without disrupting current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers and turns their results into structured workflows, case linkage, evidence and reports rather than replacing underlying compliance tools.
final_title: Structure SAR and STR drafting workflows with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into AI-assisted case workflows supporting audit-ready SAR and STR evidence packages.
